title: Marketing Intelligence System — Tag Ontology
description: Controlled vocabulary for all creative tagging. No free-text allowed on primary fields. This schema is enforced at A4 output and at memory write.

hook_type.description: Primary psychological mechanism of the creative hook

hook_subtype.description: Required when hook_type = OTHER. Max 30 chars. Examples: 'meme_led', 'trend_hijack', 'festive_seasonal'

URGENCY.do_not_use_when: Deadline is fabricated or rolling — this erodes trust over time

SCARCITY.use_when: Slots, inventory, or reward pool is genuinely limited
SCARCITY.do_not_use_when: Confusable with URGENCY — scarcity has no time reference

TRUST.use_when: Acquisition campaigns, skeptical segments, first-time-user flows
TRUST.do_not_use_when: High-intent repeat users — they already trust the brand

CONVENIENCE.use_when: Feature adoption, how-to campaigns, drop-off re-engagement
CONVENIENCE.example: Pay in 2 taps. No documents. Works offline.
CONVENIENCE.do_not_use_when: Brand campaigns where aspiration, not ease, is the message

REWARD.use_when: Offer is strong enough to lead with. Cashback, points, prizes.
REWARD.example: Get ₹50 cashback on your next UPI payment.
REWARD.do_not_use_when: Offer is weak — leading with a small reward makes it look smaller

IDENTITY.use_when: Brand campaigns, reactivation, premium product positioning
IDENTITY.example: Smart money moves. Welcome to Paytm Gold.
IDENTITY.do_not_use_when: Performance campaigns needing direct response — identity hooks have low CTR

OTHER.use_when: Meme-led, trend hijack, festive-seasonal, creator-led — anything that doesn't fit above
OTHER.promotion_rule: If the same hook_subtype appears 3+ times in memory, flag for quarterly ontology review

enforcement.where: A4 output schema validator (function, runs before A5)
enforcement.rule_1: All primary fields must match enum values exactly — case-sensitive
enforcement.rule_2: hook_subtype is required when hook_type = OTHER
enforcement.rule_4: On validation failure: soft error returned to A4 for correction. Not skipped. Not bypassed.
enforcement.rule_5: Tags are set at A4 (generation time). Never inferred retrospectively from copy text.
enforcement.quarterly_review: Review hook_subtype values quarterly. Promote repeated values (3+ uses) to named hook_type entries.
